import { useState, useEffect } from 'react' import { useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom' import { supabase } from '../supabaseClient' export default function JobBoard() { const navigate = useNavigate() const [jobs, setJobs] = useState([]) const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) const [filters, setFilters] = useState({ nganh_nghe: '', dia_diem: '' }) useEffect(() => { fetchJobs() }, [filters]) const fetchJobs = async () => { setLoading(true) try { // L蘯･y c蘯｣ ﾄ柁｡n ﾄ紳ng tuy盻ハ vﾃ S蘯ｯp h蘯ｿt h蘯｡n let query = supabase.from('don_hang').select('*') .in('trang_thai', ['ﾄ紳ng tuy盻ハ', 'S蘯ｯp h蘯ｿt h蘯｡n']) .order('created_at', { ascending: false }) if (filters.nganh_nghe) query = query.eq('nganh_nghe', filters.nganh_nghe) if (filters.dia_diem) query = query.ilike('dia_diem_lam_viec', `%${filters.dia_diem}%`) const { data, error } = await query if (error) throw error setJobs(data) } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching jobs:', error) } finally { setLoading(false) } } const industries = ['Cﾆ｡ khﾃｭ', 'Xﾃ｢y d盻ｱng', 'Nﾃｴng nghi盻㎝', 'Ch蘯ｿ bi蘯ｿn th盻ｱc ph蘯ｩm', 'May m蘯ｷc', 'ﾄ進盻㌻ t盻ｭ'] const handleJobClick = (job) => { navigate(`/yeu-cau-tu-van?don_hang=${job.id}`) } return (
{/* PAGE HERO */}

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react' import { useSearchParams, Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' import { supabase } from '../supabaseClient' export default function YeuCauTuVan() { const [searchParams] = useSearchParams() const donHangId = searchParams.get('don_hang') const navigate = useNavigate() const [job, setJob] = useState(null) const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false) // Form State const [formData, setFormData] = useState({ fullName: '', phone: '', email: '', birthYear: '', gender: 'Nam', hometown: '', note: '' }) const INTEREST_TAGS = [ "Ch蘯ｿ bi蘯ｿn th盻ｱc ph蘯ｩm", "Cﾆ｡m h盻冪", "Xﾃ｢y d盻ｱng", "May m蘯ｷc", "Cﾆ｡ khﾃｭ/Hﾃn", "Nﾃｴng nghi盻㎝", "S盻ｭa ch盻ｯa ﾃｴ tﾃｴ", "ﾄ進盻㌻ t盻ｭ", "Chi phﾃｭ th蘯･p", "Bay nhanh", "Vay v盻創", "H盻皇 ti蘯ｿng t蘯｡i ngu盻渡" ] const addInterest = (tag) => { setFormData(prev => { const current = prev.note || '' if (current.includes(tag)) return prev const newNote = current ? `${current}, ${tag}` : tag return { ...prev, note: newNote } }) } useEffect(() => { if (donHangId) { fetchJobInfo() } }, [donHangId]) const fetchJobInfo = async () => { try { const { data, error } = await supabase .from('don_hang') .select('*') .eq('id', donHangId) .single() if (error) throw error setJob(data) } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching job:', error) } finally { setLoading(false) } } const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault() setSubmitting(true) if (!formData.phone || formData.phone.length < 10) { alert('Vui lﾃｲng nh蘯ｭp s盻・ﾄ訴盻㌻ tho蘯｡i h盻｣p l盻・') setSubmitting(false) return } if (!formData.email) { alert('Vui lﾃｲng nh蘯ｭp Email!') setSubmitting(false) return } try { const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear() const age = formData.birthYear ? (currentYear - parseInt(formData.birthYear)) : null const noteContent = `[Gi盻嬖 tﾃｭnh: ${formData.gender}] ${job ? `[ﾄ脆｡n: ${job.ten_don_hang}] ` : ''}${formData.note || ''}` const { error } = await supabase.from('yeu_cau_tu_van').insert([{ ho_ten: formData.fullName, so_dien_thoai: formData.phone, email: formData.email, tuoi: age, gioi_tinh: formData.gender, que_quan: formData.hometown, ghi_chu: noteContent, trang_thai: 'Ch盻・tﾆｰ v蘯･n' }]) if (error) throw error alert('Kﾃｭch ho蘯｡t h盻・sﾆ｡ thﾃnh cﾃｴng! H盻・th盻創g AI ﾄ疎ng phﾃ｢n tﾃｭch vﾃ chuyﾃｪn viﾃｪn s蘯ｽ liﾃｪn h盻・s盻嬶.') navigate('/') } catch (error) { console.error('L盻擁 g盻ｭi form:', error) alert('Cﾃｳ l盻擁 x蘯｣y ra: ' + error.message) } finally { setSubmitting(false) } } return (
